description:
Join us on Wednesday, May 6, from 4 - 7 PM at Whispering Vine - South Creek for a tasting featuring High-Scoring Chianti.

Tasting Fee: $30 per person (Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.)

Featured Wines:

  • Tenuta di Arceno Chianti Classico Riserva 2020 – Wine Spectator 94, James Suckling 93 – The 2020 Riserva opens with cypress, black cherry, vanilla and subtle spice, then carries tart raspberry, white pepper and orange peel on a bright, structured finish.
  • Tenuta di Arceno Chianti Classico 2022 – James Suckling 92 – Ripe strawberry, violet and subtle white pepper lead into raspberry, white chocolate and vanilla bean, all framed by fresh acidity and a warm spice finish.
  • Ruffino Riserva Ducale Chianti Classico Riserva 2021 – Wine Spectator 93, James Suckling 92, #17 Wine Spectator Top 100 of 2025 – A complex Chianti with violet, cherry, wild berry and plum notes layered with tobacco, clove and a fresh eucalyptus lift, finishing balanced and persistent.
  • Frescobaldi Tenuta Perano Chianti Classico 2021 – Wine Spectator 93, Decanter 90, Vinous 90 – Bright ruby and floral, with cherry, plum, violet and wild rose notes moving into clove, cardamom and a fresh balsamic edge over silky tannins.

Come explore High-Scoring Chianti and find your favorite bottle. Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded.
title: High-Scoring Chianti Tasting
